chunks.text: ORDER SHEET IN THE HIGH COURT OF SINDH BENCH AT SUKKUR Cr. Misc. Application No. D – 565 of 2018 Date of hearing Order with signature of Judge For hearing of main case (Letter issued to IGP Sindh Karachi) (Show Cause Notice issued to Shabbir Sethar SSP Larkana) 29.06.2018 Ms. Farzana Bhatti, Advocate for the applicant. Mr. Abdul Rehman Kolachi, Deputy Prosecutor General for the State along with Ghulam Shabbir Sethar (SSP Larkana), Inspector Noor Din (Incharge CIA Khairpur), SIP Noor Ahmed Laghari (SHO Police Station ‘B’ Section Khairpur), Inspector Muhammad Ameen (IO Police Station ‘A’ Section Khairpur), Abdul Rahim Phulpoto (Mashir of the case), Muneer Ahmed Phulpoto (Mashir of the case), Faiz Muhammad Phulpoto (Complainant), Babar Ali (Abductee) and Naseer Ahmed Sahito (Detainee / Arrested Accused)..-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.-.- Through instant petition, the petitioner sought production of detainee Naseer Ahmed on the plea that police officers have detained her son and demanding illegal gratification. It is pleaded that before this petition, the petitioner approached District & Sessions Judge Khairpur under Section 491, Cr.P.C. Raid was conducted at various police stations, but detention was not found and such application was disposed of. After issuance of notices by this Court, respondents caused appearance and contended that detainee is not in their custody, however, SSP Khairpur was directed to produce the detainee. On 28.06.2018, police officials filed comments appended with FIR No.157/2018 of Police Station ‘A’ Section under Section 365-B, PPC, lodged by one private person, wherein date of offence was shown as 9th June 2018 at 07:00 a.m. as well they shown arrest of detainee on 22nd June 2018.

After issuance of notices by this Court, respondents caused appearance and contended that detainee is not in their custody, however, SSP Khairpur was directed to produce the detainee. On 28.06.2018, police officials filed comments appended with FIR No.157/2018 of Police Station ‘A’ Section under Section 365-B, PPC, lodged by one private person, wherein date of offence was shown as 9th June 2018 at 07:00 a.m. as well they shown arrest of detainee on 22nd June 2018. Abductee was also present and contended that on 09.06.2018, he was abducted by two persons and he was confined at some unknown place where he was recovered in a police raid. Petitioner filed a petition before District & Sessions Judge Khairpur as well she rushed here. Whereas, abductee’s contention is that he was abducted on 09.06.2018 and he was recovered on the same date, but record shows that no FIR was lodged from 9th June 2018 to 18th June 2018. Police Investigation Officer, present, contends that as per his investigation, this is a doubtful case and arrested accused is innocent, hence, this case is required to be disposed of in false class. Accordingly, I.O. will submit such report to the Civil Judge / Judicial Magistrate concerned for its disposal. Since it has come on record that the instant FIR is false, hence, proceedings of FIR No.157/2018 of Police Station ‘A’ Section under Section 365-B, PPC, are quashed. Detainee Naseer Ahmed is released in the Court. Jail Authorities shall make such entry in their record. The Cr. Misc. Application is disposed of in the above terms. J U D G E J U D G E Abdul Basit
